evidence.snippet: Allocortech motor controllers are trusted by several legacy and startup aerospace OEMs in the UAS and AAM markets.

Taurus Motor Controllers are based around a full four quadrant Field Oriented Control (FOC) through Space Vector Pulse Width Modulation (SVPWM) drive. Each model is tailored around its specific application. All Taurus platforms support CAN 2.0 and RS-485 communication interfaces for control and monitoring.

items.notes: Taurus series BLDC motor controllers (Taurus OTiS, AEX, AE, C60) are the flagship product line

evidence.snippet: The Lohner Smart Battery couples a high energy density LiPo battery with full-featured monitoring and control system to provide high-availability standby power for your mission-critical system. This compact package with rugged power and communication connectors is suitable for installation almost anywhere.

items.notes: Lohner smart battery; also designs MGUs, BMSs, battery chargers

evidence.snippet:
### Comms + Power Hub
The Clio is a computation, communications, and power distribution hub designed to trade off electronics vs harness weight in a hub and spoke system. Depending on client needs the Clio can be just a low power data and power switch, or a high power flight computer.

items.notes: Clio-B: computation, communications, and power distribution hub

Allocortech is a small and agile technical company providing an array of expertise and products for avionics, control systems, and general embedded systems applications of various flavors.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and sells major UAS/UAM subsystems: motor controllers, power systems, flight controllers, FTS, comms hubs

Allocortech’s flagship high voltage motor controller

A low voltage motor controller packaged in an IP67 enclosure.

Comet FTS
=========

Clio is distributed I/O for your electric or hybrid electric powered vehicle
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
The Clio is a computation, communications, and power distribution hub designed to trade off electronics vs harness weight in a hub and spoke system. Depending on client needs the Clio can be just a low power data and power switch, or a high power flight computer.

Lohner
======
The Lohner Smart Battery couples a high energy density LiPo battery with full-featured monitoring and control system to provide high-availability standby power for your mission-critical system. This compact package with rugged power and communication connectors is suitable for installation almost anywhere.

### Atlas Flight Controller
Low-cost flight computer solution based on PixHawk PX4 open-source autopilot.

tagline: Virginia-based subsystem supplier producing BLDC motor controllers (Taurus line: AEX, AE, C60, 400 OTiS up to 20 kW), flight termination systems (Comet FTS, dual-redundant radio-linked), flight computers/power hubs (Clio-B), and smart battery packs (Lohner). NDAA-compliant, in production across propulsion electronics, power systems, flight control, and termination. Blue UAS status unknown; limited public visibility on specific platform integrations or defense contracts.
